base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of armos_knight_color_variants — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Armos variants — 4 palettes (red/blue/gray/purple) for different positions around the 'Armos ring' in overworld. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Armos variants — 4 palettes (red/blue/gray/purple) for different positions around the 'Armos ring' in overworld
